name: Luxury Halong Bay & Sapa Adventure 5 days
places: Meals:4 Breakfasts, 1 Lunch, 1 Brunch, 1 Picnic Lunch, 2 Dinner
highlights: Spend two nights in a private compartment on the deluxe train heading to Sapa
Experience the stunning mountainous scenery of Sapa, gain more insights into ethnic culture and customs
Enjoy a two-day excursion cruising through the emerald waters of Halong Bay, and discovering its amazing natural wonders

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Overnight Train to Sapa
itinerary.description:
Evening

You will be warmed up with the local guide at your hotel and begin your amazing trip by taking you to the Hanoi Train Station

Depart from Hanoi to Lao Cai by staying overnight in a VIP Cabin on the train - It will be an unforgettable experience for you to experience the sleeper train

itinerary.title: Lao Cai - Sapa - Cat Cat Village
itinerary.description:
Morning

Disembark from the train upon arrival at Lao Cai Station. Setting foot in Lao Cai, you will feel the cool fresh air utterly different from the atmosphere in Hanoi Old Quarter. Take a one-hour bus ride to the charming town of Sapa - a cloud paradise - the pride of the Northwest mountains, where you can enjoy stunning views and picturesque rice terraces along the way. After breakfast, take a morning stroll to the Local Marketplace, where local ethnic minorities come to trade handicrafts, silverware, and embroidery. You are free to explore the local life and the incredibly unique culture...

itinerary.title: Sa Pa - Lao Cai - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

After having breakfast at the hotel, we will visit Ta Phin Village, the first stop of the trekking journey at 08:00, which has the most beautiful traditional costumes of the Red Dao ethnic people. Located in a remote location and rarely visited by tourists, Ta Phin village retains the wild landscape, and the indigenous people still retain the most affluent cultural identities. Afternoon

13:30: Say goodbye to Ta Phin Village and start trekking through the picturesque Sa Pa Valley to the villages of Lao Chai Village and Ta Van Village. Let's blow your mind with the "specialty" of the N...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast at your hotel in Hanoi, your private driver will greet you for a comfortable transfer to Halong Bay (approx. 2.5-3 hours via expressway). Enjoy scenic countryside views along the way. Upon arrival at Tuan Chau Marina, transfer to the ship's reception lounge and board a cruise to explore the stunning views of this UNESCO World Heritage site's limestone cliffs and emerald seas. Afternoon

Lunch is served on the boat while cruising leisurely through the spectacular scenery of Halong Bay

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Cruise - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your fresh morning in the Natural Wonder of the World by joining a Tai Chi session. A perfect way to recharge your energy before a morning excursion and take a deep breath in the middle of majestic Halong Bay. After breakfast, you will be ferried to the most stunning caves in Halong. The magnificent limestone in the wonderful caves of Halong Bay will blow your mind. Please remember to bring the sneaker for discovering the cave

While brunch is being served, the boat will begin its journey back to the harbor

included: Transfer by airconditioned vehicle as per itineary
Round trip train tickets Hanoi - Lao Cai - Hanoi in VIP cabin.
Accommodation shared in Twin/Double room with daily breakfast.
Halong Bay Cruise program shared in Twin/Double cabin as per tour.
Meals as stated in the itinerary.
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
